title: V Safety Fire Action Notice Sign - Clear 5-Step Emergency Instructions - 150mm x 200mm Portrait Safety Signage for Buildings & Offices - Durable 1mm Rigid Plastic, EN ISO 7010:2012 Compliant
features: CRYSTAL-CLEAR GUIDANCE - This fire action sign and fire alarm call point sign provides vital safety instructions at a glance. Bold screen-printed text on a white background ensures everyone knows what to do when seconds count.

BUILT TO LAST - Crafted from robust 1mm rigid plastic, this fire action notice sign can withstand daily wear and tear. The durable construction maintains its pristine appearance and crucial messaging, year after year in busy environments.

SAFETY MADE SIMPLE - From sounding the alarm at the fire call point sign to reaching the fire assembly point sign outdoors, this fire safety sign shows step-by-step emergency instructions. The clear layout helps everyone exit safely.

REGULATION READY - Fully compliant with EN ISO 7010:2012 standards, these fire notice signs promote workplace health and safety. Mount them near fire exit signs and call points to create a comprehensive safety system.

PRACTICAL SIZING - At 150 x 200mm, this portrait-oriented fire action signs catches attention without overwhelming your wall space. The ideal dimensions ensure text remains readable from a comfortable distance.
